primary_blocker: Developer-affiliated management company had inflated income figures
key_intelligence: Abandoned: lead was receiving inflated income projections from a developer-affiliated management company tied to the property purchase. Stayful's real-data projections were lower and more honest, making Stayful appear less attractive even though the competitor's figures were misleading. LESSON: When competing against developer-affiliated managers with inflated projections, the honesty disadvantage is real in the short term.
top_objections: The management company tied to my developer is projecting higher income than you
lead_language: The developer's management company is showing higher numbers
lost_reason: Developer-affiliated management company won with inflated projections. Honesty disadvantage vs misleading competitor.
